description: Plan B skill manifest. Installer fetches src trees from GitHub main, zips client-side, presents as .skill.

cps-capture.description: Capture knowledge into CPS Reference buckets.

cps-query.description: Query the CPS knowledge base via CLI.

cps-refresh.description: Incrementally re-index the CPS knowledge base.

cps-init.description: Canonical CPS scaffolder (fetches cps_scaffold.py from main at runtime).

cps-patcher.description: Apply incremental CPS updates to existing projects.

cps-setup.description: Canonical menu-driven CPS installer (Core or Full). Nested cps-query.skill and cps-refresh.skill sub-skills are NOT bundled in src; cps-setup must be updated to fetch them via plan_b_install at install time.
